profile.name: RIVAN MEINAKI
profile.title: AI ENGINEER
profile.tagline: I build LLM-powered products & intelligent agents
profile.about: AI Engineer specializing in large language models, retrieval systems, and autonomous agents. I turn research papers into production systems — and I do it with style.

contact.contactHeading: Let's build the next arc together!
contact.contactSubtext: Open to AI engineering roles, collabs, and interesting problems.

projects.title: Decision Support System
projects.desc: An intelligent automated incident analysis and decision support system engineered to streamline operational reporting and accelerate decision-making, built using Python, the OpenRouter API for multi-tier LLM prompt routing and reasoning, and a modular ChromaDB vector database for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to retrieve historical case data for context-aware recommendations. The system is fully containerized with Docker, utilizes Traefik for traffic management and reverse proxy, and includes automated PDF generation tools for comprehensive incident documentation.

projects.title: Mecha-Vision
projects.desc: Real-time object detection pipeline for factory QA. YOLOv8 fine-tuned on custom dataset, deployed at 45 FPS on edge devices.

projects.title: Agent-Zero
projects.desc: Multi-agent workflow system that automates research reports — planner, retriever, and writer agents collaborating via tool calls.

projects.title: Waifu-Diffusion Lab
projects.desc: Fine-tuned Stable Diffusion with LoRA for consistent character generation. Custom training pipeline + Gradio demo app.

experience.desc: Shipping LLM features used by 100k+ users. Built internal RAG platform and eval framework.
Built recommendation models and data pipelines. Reduced inference latency by 60%.
